sentence: What brollege forgets, the Clavito's collarbone remembers.

wombos.definition: College attended primarily for the bro experience — frat-coded, beer-coded, post-grad employment treated as an afterthought.
wombos.example: He didn't go to college, he went to brollege.

wombos.definition: A powerful, authoritative figure whose dominance is rooted in elite clavicular mogging — a Godfather-type who rules through bone structure as much as presence.
wombos.example: You don't challenge a Clavito — his collarbones alone end careers.
